notes.graphicalFaults: Hilarious artefact where the wire of the zipline in the first mission isn't rendered, not a playability issue
notes.inputFaults: As others have noted, when the game engine goes to grab the camera for a cutscene it may drop some mouse input
notes.performanceFaults: Frame dips, not entirely sure whether it's the game engine or not
notes.verdict: Pretty good, should run on a potato machine - but technical issues even from the original launch are amplified with emulation. Still enjoy
